title: Locke's Spears
description: Changes the model of the spears to a more mild fantasy look without detracting from vanilla.
body:
# Locke's Spears
Locke's Spears aims to change the vanilla model of the spears to have more distiction and character between each tier without feeling too out of place for vanilla minecraft while still feeling new and interesting.

   I _originally_ made this as a personal project because I didn't like the default spears texture, and others felt the same way.

   These models are perfect for a medieval/fantasy vibe that sticks close to minecraft's core, or for regular survival minecraft.


![Jousting with the Copper Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05333db64be7447908d336e9d32dc528dc16f3c3.png)

![Spear Display Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/324bc73cfb9dd485062330484b7668ada3393f8f_0.webp)
